title: W's Useful Horse Armor
description: Makes horse armor useful in Cobblemon!
body:
# Horse armor for Cobblemon!

**Ever wished your horse armor worked on Cobblemon?**

No? Then this pack isn't for you! Because that's what this datapack does. Cobblemon can now gain a PvE armor buff depending on the armor tier in their held item slot. This armor buff does **not** have an affect in Pokémon vs. Pokémon battles, only against vanilla damage sources.

### Values
| Armor Tier | Armor Points | Armor Toughness  | Knockback Resistance |
|------------|------------:|-----------------:|---------------------:|
| Leather|3|0|0
|Copper|4|0|0
|Iron|5|0|0
|Gold|7|0|0
|Diamond|11|2|0
|Netherite|19|3|1

Add your own items or edit values in ```data/cmds/function/tick.mcfunction```.


Future Updates (no promises)
- data/resource pack combo to rename and retexture horse armor
- add custom recipes for armor
- fix... the issue...




**That's it. That's the datapack. Enjoy.**
